testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout_returns_429_after_5

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least one 429 within 30 attempts; got codes=[401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 500, 500, 500, 500, 401, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500]. Likely backend identifier uses pod-internal IP (request.client.host) splitting counter across pods, OR datetime comparison bug. assert 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cms_blog.py:101: in test_brute_force_lockout_returns_429_after_5 assert 429 in codes, ( E AssertionError: Expected at least one 429 within 30 attempts; got codes=[401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 500, 500, 500, 500, 401, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500, 500]. Likely backend identifier uses pod-internal IP (request.client.host) splitting counter across pods, OR datetime comparison bug. E assert 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, ...]
